---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce:
1. Run `bash oled-safe.sh`
2. ...

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened (paste terminal output here).

## Environment
- Ubuntu version: (run `lsb_release -a`)
- Session type: (run `echo $XDG_SESSION_TYPE` — should say `wayland` or `x11`)
- GNOME version: (run `gnome-shell --version`)
- Python version: (run `python3 --version`)
